name: RIGEL PHARMACEUTICALS INC
business: Rigel Pharmaceuticals is a biotechnology company focused on developing and providing novel therapies for hematologic disorders and cancer. Its three FDA-approved products are TAVALISSE for chronic immune thrombocytopenia, REZLIDHIA for relapsed/refractory acute myeloid leukemia with IDH1 mutation, and GAVRETO for RET fusion-positive non-small cell lung cancer and thyroid cancer. The company also has a clinical pipeline including R289 for lower-risk myelodysplastic syndrome and collaborations for olutasidenib in other indications.
sellsTo: Hematologists and oncologists in the US
International partners (Grifols, Kissei, Medison, Dr. Reddy's)

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company dedicated to developing and providing novel therapies that significantly improve the lives of patients with hematologic disorders and cancer.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment of dose expansion phase and select recommended Phase 2 dose for R289
catalysts.sentence: We are on track to complete enrollment of the dose expansion phase of the Phase 1b study and select the recommended Phase 2 dose for future clinical studies in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Share preliminary data from dose expansion phase of R289 study
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate sharing preliminary data from the dose expansion phase of the study by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Annora license to sell generic TAVALISSE begins
catalysts.sentence: Under the terms of the settlement agreement, Annora will have a license to sell its generic product in the second quarter of 2032 or earlier under certain circumstances.

tamClaims.claim: Chronic ITP affects an estimated 81,300 adult patients in the US.
tamClaims.sentence: Chronic ITP affects an estimated 81,300 adult patients in the US.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 1,000 adult patients with mIDH1 R/R AML; AML incidence ~22,720 cases in US in 2026, ~120,000 globally.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there are approximately 1,000 adult patients, a well-identified patient population, with mIDH1 R/R AML, part of an AML market estimated to have an incidence of approximately 22,720 cases in the US in 2026, and an estimated 120,000 cases globally.

tamClaims.claim: Over 229,000 adult patients will be diagnosed with lung cancer in the US in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that over 229,000 adult patients in the US will be diagnosed with lung cancer in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: NSCLC accounts for 77% of all lung cancer diagnoses in the US.
tamClaims.sentence: NSCLC is the most common type of lung cancer in the US accounting for 77% of all lung cancer diagnoses.

tamClaims.claim: RET fusions are implicated in approximately 1-2% of patients with NSCLC.
tamClaims.sentence: RET fusions are implicated in approximately 1-2% of patients with NSCLC.
